harmonizing-data-for-the-digital.@value: Harmonizing Data for the Digital Product Passport

select-a-csv-file-containing.@value: Select a CSV file containing your product data. The first row must contain headers.

map-your-csv-columns-to.@value: Map your CSV columns to standard DPP fields. Unmapped columns will be ignored. You must confirm every row (mapped or ignored) by checking the box on the right. Once reviewed, you can "Save Mapping Config" for later or "Generate DPPs" using the button at the bottom.

generate-a-single-json-file.@value: Generate a single JSON file containing an array of all Digital Product Passports based on your mapping. Note: This batch export format is designed for portability. Future updates may include options for direct API uploads or segmented file generation to align with emerging DPP infrastructure standards.

part-of-the-dpp-keystone.@value: Part of the DPP Keystone project. | Impressum / Legal Notice
